name: Apple Cinnamon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and pour into the bread machine in order.
2. Set the baking control at 10 o'clock. Select "Sweet Bread" and press Start.
3. A delicious breakfast bread with a light flavor, crispy crust, and moist texture. You can adjust the amount of cinnamon to your taste. The applesauce replaces butter or margarine. Try adding chopped apple (fresh or dried) and nuts for extra flavor.
(Note: Recipe sourced from Donna German's "The Bread Machine Cookbook III".)
